subject: Routing dashboard escalation plan
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Logan,

We’ve escalated the routing dashboard issue and will share a confirmed resolution plan and owner by Monday.

We will avoid SLA guarantee language until we complete contract review. Nina, once you send the affected route IDs by Thursday, May 21, Support will use them to validate the nightly sync issue.

We will also send an executive-ready status update by May 30.

Best,
Jordan

intendedClaims.text: We’ve escalated the routing dashboard issue and will share a confirmed resolution plan and owner by Monday.
We will avoid SLA guarantee language until we complete contract review.
We will also send an executive-ready status update by May 30.
